scripts.content:prepare: pnpm run redirects:generate && pnpm run search:index && pnpm run validate:content
scripts.dev:local: SITE_URL=http://localhost:4321 SITE_BASE_PATH=/ SITE_INCLUDE_DRAFTS=true CLOUDFLARE_IMAGE_RESIZE_ENABLED=false pnpm run content:prepare && astro dev
scripts.build:local: SITE_URL=http://localhost:4321 SITE_BASE_PATH=/ SITE_INCLUDE_DRAFTS=true CLOUDFLARE_IMAGE_RESIZE_ENABLED=false pnpm run content:prepare && astro build
scripts.preview:local: SITE_URL=http://localhost:4321 SITE_BASE_PATH=/ SITE_INCLUDE_DRAFTS=true CLOUDFLARE_IMAGE_RESIZE_ENABLED=false astro preview
